steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The decisive clue is the dash: “other economists clearly find her studies valuable.” This explicitly states her usefulness. The blank must show how her frequent citations support or demonstrate this usefulness.

steps.title: Choose the word that connects the evidence to the conclusion
steps.content:
Underscores means to emphasize or highlight something, which is what the passage does—it uses frequent citations as evidence to emphasize her usefulness. Forestalls, belies, and overshadows all move in the wrong direction (preventing, contradicting, or diminishing her usefulness).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
